Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka and the others are talking[n]about that door from earlier.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13228 0 0}It would appear you've faced the threat beyond that door.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}A door connecting to the tunnel which was created within Tartarus... Perhaps an appropriate name for it would be a "{f 0 1 2}Monad door{f 0 1 27}."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}The Shadows that congregate past such doors will prove to be a valuable means of accelerating your growth.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}I must know how you fared. Did your enemies provide you with a challenge?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13222 0 0}Excellent. I am pleased to hear that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}I believe challenging more daunting foes will act as a sort of shortcut in your development.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}I've detected some sort of structure on the 91st floor. It emanates an energy not dissimilar to the door you entered.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}The dimensions of this structure resemble a tunnel. One might call it a "{f 0 1 2}Monad Passage{f 0 1 27}."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Entering this passage may provide you with another opportunity to test your mettle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}For the time being, I will log that investigation as a personal request.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I've received a new request from Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13204 0 0}I look forward to observing your continual progress.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tartarus is never gonna stop[n]being a mystery to me...[n]{f 1 1}
